description:
She helps take down predators so why is her puppy running the house?
In this episode of Walking with Cesar, I walked with actress Marisol Nichols (Riverdale), who not only plays powerful roles on screen, but also goes undercover to help rescue children and support operations that catch predators.
 
Through her foundation, Slavery Free World, Marisol partners with law enforcement in undercover sting operations targeting human trafficking and child exploitation. She can stay calm in high-stakes si
title: She Goes Undercover… But Her Puppy Won’t Behave | Walking With Cesar EP 14 - Marisol Nichols
